Details: You are only using 1 custom events. It is recommended to use more custom events to have a better understanding of the playable.

Logs.Description: You are not using any LunaPlaygroundFields attributes.
Details: You are not using any LunaPlaygroundFields attributes, it allows you to configure your playable to different concepts to find the best variation, which can drastically improve playable performance on all ad networks.

Logs.Description: TMP Font Asset uses unsupported 'Atlas Population Mode'
Details: TMP Font Asset '{0}' uses Atlas Population Mode '{1}' which is not supported

Logs.Description: URP ScreenSpaceAmbientOcclusion (SSAO) is active in URP UniversalRenderData.
Details: The Unity Playworks Plugin doesn't directly support Unity's built-in SSAO. If you enable this effect in Unity, it will not appear in your final build. To use SSAO, you can enable it directly in Dev Environment or Creative Editor on Unity Playworks.

Logs.Description: Package(s) is not supported in Luna
Details: Currently package(s) com.unity.timeline are not supported in Luna. We recommend you to remove it and workaround it's functionality.
